youtube.com::CRM software.notes: YouTube sponsorship rates vary based on CPMs and view counts; CRM software for YouTube includes Zoho CRM. Pricing for CRMs depends on features and user needs.

stacksync.com::CRM software.notes: Stacksync's pricing starts at $1,000 per month based on active sync connections and monthly record volume, with no per-row fees. Volume discounts are available for larger integrations. Pricing details are available on the Stacksync website.

zoominfo.com::CRM software.notes: ZoomInfo's pricing starts at $14,995 per year for the Professional plan, with additional costs for data migration and complexity. ZoomInfo Talent offers recruiter-specific features. Alternatives like Pin start at $100/month for full-stack recruiting.

syncgtm.com::CRM software.notes: Data credits in SyncGTM are used to measure actions like HTTP requests and monthly actions, with higher tiers offering more credits. Pricing starts at $99/month for basic features. SyncGTM offers custom pricing for large teams.

linkedin.com::CRM software.notes: LinkedIn's CRM seat pricing ranges from $8,000 to $12,000 per year per seat, and advertising costs depend on the chosen optimization goal and bidding strategy. The average incremental variable cost per CRM seat is about $1 per month.

simular.ai::CRM software.notes: Simular AI offers tiered pricing plans starting from free to $100 per pro referral signup, with dedicated support and advanced features for businesses. Simular Pro targets professionals managing multiple workflows. Simular Enterprise provides scalable, secure automation solutions.

slack.com::CRM software.notes: Slack's pricing varies by plan and user count, with Pro at $725/month for 100 users, Business+ at $1,500/month, and Enterprise+ at $4,500/month. Discounts are often available for larger teams and multi-year commitments. Slack's pricing is highly negotiable.

gartner.com::CRM software.notes: Gartner's CRM software costs range from $25,000 to $500,000 annually, with significant negotiation potential. Users typically pay between $52 and $154 per month. Gartner's pricing varies based on contract terms and add-ons.

marketbetter.ai::CRM software.notes: MarketBetter.ai starts at $149 per seat for its Standard plan. Custom features add extra costs. No hidden fees apply.

guideflow.com::CRM software.notes: Guideflow offers a partner program with recurring commissions for referrals, and its CRM software centralizes customer data and automates workflows. Pricing for Guideflow plans starts at $1,499 per month. Guideflow's partner program pays 20% lifetime commission on referred customers.

landbase.com::CRM software.notes: Landbase's pricing is custom-quoted based on platform and per-user fees. Demandbase, a key component, does not publicly disclose exact costs. For detailed pricing, contact Demandbase sales.

lagrowthmachine.com::CRM software.notes: La Growth Machine offers four pricing tiers starting at $70/month per identity, with a free trial available. Ultimate customers with four or more identities get a dedicated account manager. The Pro plan allows up to 5 sending emails per identity.

forbes.com::CRM software.notes: CRM software pricing varies widely, starting from free to thousands of dollars per year. Popular CRMs like Zoho and Agile offer free tiers with paid options starting at $20 and $14.99 per user monthly, respectively. Salesforce provides a basic free plan for two users.

momentum.io::CRM software.notes: Momentum.io offers three pricing plans starting at $69/user/month, with options for annual billing and negotiation for better rates.

affinity.co::CRM software.notes: Affinity's CRM pricing starts at $2,000 per user annually for the Essential plan, with Scale, Advanced, and Enterprise plans available at higher rates. Enterprise offers custom pricing. Sponsorship and additional features are available.

g2.com::CRM software.notes: G2's CRM and Deals pricing starts at $6 per month, with a free trial available. G2 Marketing Solutions costs $599 per month or $6,000 per year. G2 ranks top pricing software like Salesforce and Prisync based on user reviews.

crm.org::CRM software.notes: CRM software pricing varies widely; typical costs range from $100 to $500 per month for nonprofits, with additional hidden fees. Free plans are available for small teams, while enterprise solutions like Salesforce start at $75 per user per month. Always consider total cost of ownership, including ad

capsulecrm.com::CRM software.notes: Capsule CRM pricing ranges from $16.80 to $60 per user per month. It offers a 14-day free trial for its paid plans. Annual contracts are available for additional modules.

forecastio.ai::CRM software.notes: Forecastio offers cloud-based sales forecasting tools with pricing tailored for mid-market B2B companies. It integrates with HubSpot CRM and provides automated sales planning and performance tracking. Pricing details are available on vendor sites like GetApp and Software Advice.
